reference: My throat has been producing this frothy white sputum, and I always spit it out. I do not have a productive cough at all. I also experience chest and back pains later in the day. I am female, twenty-three years old, and a month ago, I was diagnosed with minimal pleural effusion. After a week of antibiotic treatment, my chest X-ray states that it is back to normal. I just do not understand why my back keeps aching.
